name: REPAIRCLIENTTOTALS_123_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE REPAIRCLIENTTOTALS_123_01
AS
DECLARE @DT         DATETIME
DECLARE @TRCODE     SMALLINT
DECLARE @SIGN       SMALLINT
DECLARE @AMOUNT     FLOAT
DECLARE @REPORTNET  FLOAT
DECLARE @CLIENTREF  INT
DECLARE @MODULENR   SMALLINT
DECLARE @CANCELLED  SMALLINT
DECLARE @REPORTRATE FLOAT
DECLARE @SOURCEFREF INT
DECLARE @STATUS     SMALLINT
DECLARE @LINENET FLOAT
DECLARE @LINENETREP FLOAT
DECLARE @CARIREF FLOAT
DECLARE @KDV  INT
DECLARE @STATU  INT
DECLARE @STATUDESP  INT
DECLARE @TRKOD  INT
DECLARE @KAPALIMI INT
DECLARE @BILLED  INT
DECLARE @TOPLAMTUTAR FLOAT
DECLARE @TOPLAMTUTARREP FLOAT
DECLARE @KDVTUTARI FLOAT
DECLARE @KDVTUTARIREP FLOAT
DECLARE @MIKTAR  FLOAT
DECLARE @KALANMIKTAR FLOAT
DECLARE @RAPORLAMA FLOAT
DECLARE @CLREF      INT
DECLARE @NETTOTAL   FLOAT
DECLARE @CEKSTAT     INT
DECLARE @AMNT FLOAT
DECLARE @CEKREP FLOAT
DECLARE @KC FLOAT
DECLARE @PS FLOAT
DECLARE @REPKC FLOAT
DECLARE @REPPS FLOAT
DECLARE @TYP INT
DECLARE @NUMSREF INT
DECLARE @COEF INT
DECLARE @RISKINC FLOAT
DECLARE @REPRISKINC FLOAT
DECLARE @RISKTIPI SMALLINT
DECLARE @DETLN INT
DECLARE @FIRMCALENDARTYPE SMALLINT
DECLARE @MONTH SMALLINT
DECLARE @YEAR  SMALLINT
DECLARE @AFFECTCOLLATRL SMALLINT
DECLARE @COLLATRLREF INT
DECLARE @AFFECTRISK SMALLINT
DECLARE @WITHPAYTRANS SMALLINT
DECLARE @FROMORDWITHPAY SMALLINT
set NOCOUNT ON
DELETE FROM LG_123_01_CLTOTFIL WHERE  CARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
DELETE FROM LG_123_01_GNTOTCL  WHERE  CARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
SET KC=0,PS=0,
    RISKTOTAL=0, REPRISKTOTAL=0,
    ACCRISKTOTAL=0, REPACCRISKTOTAL=0,
    MYCSRISKTOTAL=0, REPMYCSRISKTOTAL=0,
    CSTCSRISKTOTAL=0, REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL=0,
    CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL=0, REPCSTCSCIRORISKTOT=0,
    CSTCSOWNRISKTOTAL=0, REPCSTCSOWNRISKTOT=0,
    ORDRISKTOTAL=0, REPORDRISKTOTAL=0,
    ORDRISKTOTALSUGG=0, REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG=0,
    DESPRISKTOTAL=0, REPDESPRISKTOTAL=0,
    DESPRISKTOTALSUG=0, REPDESPRISKTOTALSUG=0,
    REPKC=0,REPPS=0,
    CEK0_DEBIT=0,CEK0_CREDIT=0,CEK1_DEBIT=0,CEK1_CREDIT=0,
    SENET0_DEBIT=0,SENET0_CREDIT=0,SENET1_DEBIT=0,SENET1_CREDIT=0,
    CEKCURR0_DEBIT=0,CEKCURR0_CREDIT=0,CEKCURR1_DEBIT=0,CEKCURR1_CREDIT=0,
    SENETCURR0_DEBIT=0,SENETCURR0_CREDIT=0,SENETCURR1_DEBIT=0,SENETCURR1_CREDIT=0
WHERE  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
UPDATE LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
SET RISKLIMIT=0, REPRISKLIMIT=0,
    PCOLLATRLTOTAL=0, REPPCOLLATRLTOTAL=0,
    SCOLLATRLTOTAL=0, REPSCOLLATRLTOTAL=0,
    RISKTOTAL=0, REPRISKTOTAL=0,
    ORDRISKTOTAL=0, REPORDRISKTOTAL=0,
    ORDRISKTOTALSUGG=0, REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG=0,
    DESPRISKTOTAL=0, REPDESPRISKTOTAL=0,
    CSRISKTOTAL=0, REPCSRISKTOTAL=0
WHERE  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 SELECT @FIRMCALENDARTYPE = FIRMCALENDARTYPE FROM LG_123_TRGPAR
 IF @FIRMCALENDARTYPE=0
  BEGIN
   DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
    SELECT SIGN, SUM(AMOUNT), SUM(REPORTNET), CLIENTREF, AFFECTCOLLATRL, AFFECTRISK
    FROM LG_123_01_CLFLINE WITH(INDEX = I123_01_CLFLINE_I4)
    WHERE  CLIENTREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0))) AND (ISNULL(PAIDINCASH,0)=0) AND (ISNULL(CANCELLED,0)=0) AND (MODULENR <> 6) AND (MODULENR <> 61) AND (TRCODE <> 12) AND
          (ISNULL(STATUS,0)=0) AND ((ISNULL(AFFECTRISK,0) = 0) OR (ISNULL(AFFECTCOLLATRL,0) = 1))
    GROUP BY CLIENTREF, SIGN, AFFECTCOLLATRL, AFFECTRISK
   OPEN CurS
   FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
   INTO @SIGN, @AMOUNT, @REPORTNET, @CLIENTREF, @AFFECTCOLLATRL, @AFFECTRISK
   WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
   BEGIN
     BEGIN TRANSACTION
       EXECUTE LG_UPDATE_CLTRANS_123_01 1, 0, @SIGN, @AMOUNT, @REPORTNET, @CLIENTREF, 0, 0, 0, 0, @AFFECTCOLLATRL, @AFFECTRISK, 0, 1
     COMMIT TRANSACTION
     FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
     INTO @SIGN, @AMOUNT, @REPORTNET, @CLIENTREF, @AFFECTCOLLATRL, @AFFECTRISK
   END
   CLOSE CurS
   DEALLOCATE CurS
  END
 ELSE
  BEGIN
   DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
    SELECT SIGN, SUM(AMOUNT), SUM(REPORTNET), CLIENTREF, AFFECTCOLLATRL, AFFECTRISK
    FROM LG_123_01_CLFLINE WITH(INDEX = I123_01_CLFLINE_I4)
    WHERE  CLIENTREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0))) AND (ISNULL(PAIDINCASH,0)=0) AND (ISNULL(CANCELLED,0)=0) AND (MODULENR <> 6) AND (MODULENR <> 61) AND (TRCODE <> 12) AND
          (ISNULL(STATUS,0)=0) AND ((ISNULL(AFFECTRISK,0) = 0) OR (ISNULL(AFFECTCOLLATRL,0) = 1))
    GROUP BY CLIENTREF,SIGN, AFFECTCOLLATRL, AFFECTRISK
   OPEN CurS
   FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
   INTO @SIGN, @AMOUNT, @REPORTNET, @CLIENTREF, @AFFECTCOLLATRL, @AFFECTRISK
   WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
   BEGIN
     BEGIN TRANSACTION
       EXECUTE LG_UPDATE_CLTRANS_123_01 1, 0, @SIGN, @AMOUNT, @REPORTNET, @CLIENTREF, 0, 0, 0, 0, @AFFECTCOLLATRL, @AFFECTRISK, 0, 1
     COMMIT TRANSACTION
     FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
     INTO @SIGN, @AMOUNT, @REPORTNET, @CLIENTREF, @AFFECTCOLLATRL, @AFFECTRISK
   END
   CLOSE CurS
   DEALLOCATE CurS
  END
DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
 SELECT  I.CLIENTREF CARI, I.STATUS STATU, I.TRCODE TRKOD, I.BILLEDITEM,
         SUM((I.LINENET-I.DISTDISC+I.DISTEXP+I.DISTCOST+I.DISTEXPVAT+I.ADDTAXAMOUNT+I.DISTDISCVAT+I.VATAMNT)/I.AMOUNT*
         (CASE WHEN (I.AMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG) > 0 THEN (I.AMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG) ELSE 0 END)) TOPLAMTUTAR,
         SUM((CASE WHEN REPORTRATE > 0 THEN (((I.LINENET-I.DISTDISC+I.DISTEXP+I.DISTCOST+I.DISTEXPVAT+I.ADDTAXAMOUNT+I.DISTDISCVAT+I.VATAMNT)/I.AMOUNT)*
         (CASE WHEN (I.AMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG) > 0 THEN (I.AMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG) ELSE 0 END))/I.REPORTRATE ELSE 0 END)) TOPLAMTUTARREP
 FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE I WITH(INDEX = I123_01_ORFLINE_I5)
 WHERE I.LINETYPE IN (0, 4, 6, 10)  AND  CLIENTREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))  AND (ISNULL(I.AFFECTRISK,0) = 0) AND (ISNULL(I.WITHPAYTRANS,0)=0) AND (ISNULL(I.CLOSED,0)<>1) AND (ISNULL(I.DETLINE,0)=0)
 GROUP BY I.CLIENTREF, I.TRCODE, I.STATUS, I.BILLEDITEM
OPEN CurS
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
INTO @CARIREF, @STATU, @TRKOD, @BILLED, @TOPLAMTUTAR, @TOPLAMTUTARREP
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
 BEGIN
   BEGIN TRANSACTION
     SET @LINENET = @TOPLAMTUTAR
     SET @LINENETREP = @TOPLAMTUTARREP
     EXECUTE LG_UPDATECLCARDRISKNUMS_123_01 @CARIREF, @TRKOD, @LINENET, -1, 0, @BILLED, @STATU, 0, @LINENETREP
  COMMIT TRANSACTION
  FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
  INTO @CARIREF, @STATU, @TRKOD,  @BILLED, @TOPLAMTUTAR,@TOPLAMTUTARREP
 END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
 SELECT  I.CLIENTREF CARI, I.STATUS STATU, I.TRCODE TRKOD, I.BILLEDITEM,
         SUM((I.LINENET-I.DISTDISC+I.DISTEXP+I.DISTCOST+I.DISTEXPVAT+I.ADDTAXAMOUNT+I.DISTDISCVAT+I.VATAMNT)/I.AMOUNT*
         (CASE WHEN (I.AMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG) > 0 THEN (I.AMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG) ELSE 0 END)) TOPLAMTUTAR,
         SUM((CASE WHEN REPORTRATE > 0 THEN (((I.LINENET-I.DISTDISC+I.DISTEXP+I.DISTCOST+I.DISTEXPVAT+I.ADDTAXAMOUNT+I.DISTDISCVAT+I.VATAMNT)/I.AMOUNT)*
         (CASE WHEN (I.AMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG) > 0 THEN (I.AMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMOUNT-I.SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG) ELSE 0 END))/I.REPORTRATE ELSE 0 END)) TOPLAMTUTARREP
 FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE I WITH(INDEX = I123_01_ORFLINE_I5)
 WHERE I.LINETYPE IN (0, 4, 6, 10)  AND  CLIENTREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))  AND (ISNULL(I.AFFECTCOLLATRL,0)=1) AND (ISNULL(I.CLOSED,0)<>1) AND (ISNULL(I.DETLINE,0)=0)
 GROUP BY I.CLIENTREF, I.TRCODE, I.STATUS, I.BILLEDITEM
OPEN CurS
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
INTO @CARIREF, @STATU, @TRKOD, @BILLED, @TOPLAMTUTAR, @TOPLAMTUTARREP
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
 BEGIN
   BEGIN TRANSACTION
     SET @LINENET = @TOPLAMTUTAR
     SET @LINENETREP = @TOPLAMTUTARREP
     EXECUTE LG_UPDCOLLATRLRISK_123_01 @CARIREF, @TRKOD, @LINENET, -1, 0, @BILLED, @STATU, 0, @LINENETREP
  COMMIT TRANSACTION
  FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
  INTO @CARIREF, @STATU, @TRKOD,  @BILLED, @TOPLAMTUTAR,@TOPLAMTUTARREP
 END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
 SELECT I.CLIENTREF,  I.TRCODE,SUM(I.NETTOTAL), SUM(I.REPORTNET), I.BILLED, I.STATUS STATUDESP, I.FROMORDWITHPAY
 FROM LG_123_01_STFICHE I  WHERE  CLIENTREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0))) AND (ISNULL(I.AFFECTRISK,0)=0) AND (ISNULL(I.CANCELLED,0)=0) AND (ISNULL(I.FROMORDWITHPAY,0)=0)
 GROUP BY CLIENTREF, TRCODE, BILLED, STATUS, FROMORDWITHPAY
OPEN CurS
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
INTO @CLREF, @TRCODE, @NETTOTAL, @REPORTNET, @BILLED, @STATUDESP, @FROMORDWITHPAY
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
  BEGIN
    BEGIN TRANSACTION
      EXECUTE LG_UPDATECLCARDRISKNUMS_123_01 @CLREF, @TRCODE, @NETTOTAL,1, 0, @BILLED, 0, @STATUDESP, @REPORTNET
    COMMIT TRANSACTION
    FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
    INTO @CLREF, @TRCODE, @NETTOTAL, @REPORTNET, @BILLED, @STATUDESP, @FROMORDWITHPAY
  END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
 SELECT I.CLIENTREF,  I.TRCODE,SUM(I.NETTOTAL), SUM(I.REPORTNET), I.BILLED, I.STATUS STATUDESP
 FROM LG_123_01_STFICHE I  WHERE  CLIENTREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))  AND I.AFFECTCOLLATRL=1 AND (ISNULL(I.CANCELLED,0)=0)
 GROUP BY CLIENTREF, TRCODE, BILLED, STATUS
OPEN CurS
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
INTO @CLREF, @TRCODE, @NETTOTAL, @REPORTNET, @BILLED, @STATUDESP
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
  BEGIN
    BEGIN TRANSACTION
      EXECUTE LG_UPDCOLLATRLRISK_123_01 @CLREF, @TRCODE, @NETTOTAL,1, 0, @BILLED, 0, @STATUDESP, @REPORTNET
    COMMIT TRANSACTION
    FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
    INTO @CLREF, @TRCODE, @NETTOTAL, @REPORTRATE, @BILLED, @STATUDESP
  END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE @CEKREF INT
DECLARE @DOC INT
DECLARE @RISKSTATUS INT
DECLARE @PREVST INT
DECLARE @CLCIRO INT
DECLARE @RISKCEK FLOAT
DECLARE @REPRISKCEK FLOAT
DECLARE @RISKCEKC FLOAT
DECLARE @REPRISKCEKC FLOAT
DECLARE @DEVIR INT
DECLARE @REPNET FLOAT
DECLARE @CEKAMNT FLOAT
DECLARE @UPDAMNT INT
DECLARE @RISKCOLLATRL FLOAT
DECLARE @REPRISKCOLLATRL FLOAT
DECLARE @NEWRISKCEK FLOAT
DECLARE @NEWREPRISKCEK FLOAT
DECLARE @NEWRISKCEKC FLOAT
DECLARE @NEWREPRISKCEKC FLOAT
DECLARE @AFFRISK SMALLINT
DECLARE @CSCIRO SMALLINT
DECLARE CURS CURSOR FOR
SELECT LOGICALREF, AFFECTRISK
FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS WHERE CSREF IN (SELECT CSREF FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS
WHERE CARDMD=5 AND  CARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0))))
ORDER BY CSREF ,STATNO DESC
   OPEN CURS
   FETCH NEXT FROM CURS
   INTO @CEKREF, @AFFRISK
   WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
   BEGIN
     BEGIN TRANSACTION
 EXECUTE CLCSRISK_123_01 @CEKREF,@CLREF OUTPUT,@CLCIRO OUTPUT,@RISKCEK OUTPUT,@REPRISKCEK OUTPUT,@RISKCEKC OUTPUT,@REPRISKCEKC OUTPUT,
 @NUMSREF OUTPUT,@KC OUTPUT,@PS OUTPUT,@REPKC OUTPUT,@REPPS OUTPUT,@DOC OUTPUT,@RISKSTATUS OUTPUT,@PREVST OUTPUT,@DEVIR OUTPUT,@CEKAMNT OUTPUT,
 @CEKREP OUTPUT, @UPDAMNT OUTPUT, @RISKCOLLATRL OUTPUT, @REPRISKCOLLATRL OUTPUT, @COLLATRLREF OUTPUT,@NEWRISKCEK OUTPUT,@NEWREPRISKCEK OUTPUT,@NEWRISKCEKC OUTPUT,@NEWREPRISKCEKC OUTPUT, @CSCIRO OUTPUT
        IF (ISNULL(@AFFRISK,0) = 1) AND (NOT ((@PREVST = 2) AND (@CLCIRO <> 0) AND (@CLCIRO <> @CLREF)))
         BEGIN
              SELECT @NEWRISKCEK     = 0
              SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK  = 0
              SELECT @NEWRISKCEKC    = 0
              SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEKC = 0
         END
 IF (@DOC IN (1,2))
         BEGIN
              SELECT @NEWRISKCEK    = @NEWRISKCEK * -1
              SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = @NEWREPRISKCEK * -1
              IF @RISKSTATUS = 1
               BEGIN
                  UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
                     SET CSTCSRISKTOTAL = CSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                         REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL = REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                         WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
                  IF  @CSCIRO = 1
                   BEGIN
                     UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
                     SET CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL = CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                         REPCSTCSCIRORISKTOT = REPCSTCSCIRORISKTOT + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                     WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
                   END
                  ELSE
                   BEGIN
                     UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
                     SET CSTCSOWNRISKTOTAL = CSTCSOWNRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                         REPCSTCSOWNRISKTOT = REPCSTCSOWNRISKTOT + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                     WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
                   END
               END
              ELSE
        BEGIN
                     SELECT @RISKCEK    = @RISKCEK * -1
                     SELECT @REPRISKCEK = @REPRISKCEK * -1
              SELECT @RISKCEKC = @RISKCEKC * -1
                     SELECT @REPRISKCEKC = @REPRISKCEKC * -1
                     IF @RISKSTATUS = 8 AND @PREVST IN (1,2,4,3,5,11,12,13,14)
               BEGIN
                 SELECT @RISKCEK = @RISKCEK * -1
                      SELECT @REPRISKCEK = @REPRISKCEK * -1
                     SELECT @RISKCEKC = @RISKCEKC * -1
                     SELECT @REPRISKCEKC = @REPRISKCEKC * -1
                            UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
                            SET CSTCSRISKTOTAL = CSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                                REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL = REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                            WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
                           IF  @CSCIRO = 1
                            BEGIN
                              UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
                              SET CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL = CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                                  REPCSTCSCIRORISKTOT = REPCSTCSCIRORISKTOT + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                              WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
                            END
                          ELSE
                           BEGIN
                             UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
                             SET CSTCSOWNRISKTOTAL = CSTCSOWNRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                                 REPCSTCSOWNRISKTOT = REPCSTCSOWNRISKTOT + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                             WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
                           END
                      END
                     ELSE
                      BEGIN
                        IF @RISKSTATUS = 6
                  BEGIN
                 SELECT @NEWRISKCEK    = @NEWRISKCEK * -1
                            SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = @NEWREPRISKCEK * -1
                            UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
                            SET CSTCSRISKTOTAL = CSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                                REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL = REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                                WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
                           IF  @CSCIRO = 1
                   BEGIN
                     UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
                     SET CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL = CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                         REPCSTCSCIRORISKTOT = REPCSTCSCIRORISKTOT + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                     WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
                   END
                  ELSE
                   BEGIN
                     UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
                     SET CSTCSOWNRISKTOTAL = CSTCSOWNRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                         REPCSTCSOWNRISKTOT = REPCSTCSOWNRISKTOT + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                     WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
                   END
                         END
                      END
               END
          END
 IF (@DOC IN (3,4))
          BEGIN
   SELECT @RISKCEK = @RISKCEK
                SELECT @REPRISKCEK = @REPRISKCEK
         SELECT @RISKCEKC = @RISKCEKC
         SELECT @REPRISKCEKC = @REPRISKCEKC
                SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = @NEWRISKCEK
                SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = @NEWREPRISKCEK
         SELECT @NEWRISKCEKC = @NEWRISKCEKC
         SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEKC = @NEWREPRISKCEKC
                UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
         SET MYCSRISKTOTAL = MYCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
             REPMYCSRISKTOTAL = REPMYCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
   END
 UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
    SET RISKTOTAL = RISKTOTAL + @RISKCEK,
        REPRISKTOTAL = REPRISKTOTAL + @REPRISKCEK,
        KC = KC + @KC,
        PS = PS + @PS,
        REPKC = REPKC + @REPKC,
        REPPS = REPPS + @REPPS
    WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 IF (@PREVST = 2) AND (@CLCIRO <> 0) AND (@CLCIRO <> @CLREF)
  BEGIN
        SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = @NEWRISKCEK * -1
        SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = @NEWREPRISKCEK * -1
        IF  @CSCIRO = 1
         BEGIN
            UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
           SET RISKTOTAL = RISKTOTAL + @RISKCEKC,
              REPRISKTOTAL = REPRISKTOTAL + @REPRISKCEKC,
                CSTCSRISKTOTAL = CSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL = REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK,
                CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL = CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                REPCSTCSCIRORISKTOT = REPCSTCSCIRORISKTOT + @NEWREPRISKCEK,
                KC = KC + @KC,
               PS = PS + @PS,
               REPKC = REPKC + @REPKC,
               REPPS = REPPS + @REPPS
          WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLCIRO AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
         END
       ELSE
        BEGIN
         UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
           SET RISKTOTAL = RISKTOTAL + @RISKCEKC,
              REPRISKTOTAL = REPRISKTOTAL + @REPRISKCEKC,
                CSTCSRISKTOTAL = CSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL = REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK,
                CSTCSOWNRISKTOTAL = CSTCSOWNRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                REPCSTCSOWNRISKTOT = REPCSTCSOWNRISKTOT + @NEWREPRISKCEK,
                KC = KC + @KC,
               PS = PS + @PS,
               REPKC = REPKC + @REPKC,
               REPPS = REPPS + @REPPS
          WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLCIRO AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
        END
  END
 IF (@DOC = 1) AND (@DEVIR <> 1) AND (@UPDAMNT = 1)
   UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
      SET CEK1_DEBIT = CEK1_DEBIT + @CEKAMNT,
   CEKCURR1_DEBIT = CEKCURR1_DEBIT + @CEKREP
      WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 IF (@DOC = 1) AND (@DEVIR = 1) AND (@UPDAMNT = 1)
   UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
      SET CEK0_DEBIT = CEK0_DEBIT + @CEKAMNT,
   CEKCURR0_DEBIT = CEKCURR0_DEBIT + @CEKREP
      WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 IF (@DOC = 2) AND (@DEVIR <> 1) AND (@UPDAMNT = 1)
   UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
      SET SENET1_DEBIT = SENET1_DEBIT + @CEKAMNT,
   SENETCURR1_DEBIT = SENETCURR1_DEBIT + @CEKREP
      WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 IF (@DOC = 2) AND (@DEVIR = 1) AND (@UPDAMNT = 1)
   UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
      SET SENET0_DEBIT = SENET0_DEBIT + @CEKAMNT,
   SENETCURR0_DEBIT = SENETCURR0_DEBIT + @CEKREP
      WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 IF (@DOC = 3) AND (@DEVIR <> 1) AND (@UPDAMNT = 1)
   UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
      SET CEK1_CREDIT = CEK1_CREDIT + @CEKAMNT,
   CEKCURR1_CREDIT = CEKCURR1_CREDIT + @CEKREP
      WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF  AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 IF (@DOC = 3) AND (@DEVIR = 1) AND (@UPDAMNT = 1)
   UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
      SET CEK0_CREDIT = CEK0_CREDIT + @CEKAMNT,
   CEKCURR0_CREDIT = CEKCURR0_CREDIT + @CEKREP
      WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF   AND   CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 IF (@DOC = 4) AND (@DEVIR <> 1) AND (@UPDAMNT = 1)
   UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
      SET SENET1_CREDIT = SENET1_CREDIT + @CEKAMNT,
   SENETCURR1_CREDIT = SENETCURR1_CREDIT + @CEKREP
      WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF  AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 IF (@DOC = 4) AND (@DEVIR = 1) AND (@UPDAMNT = 1)
   UPDATE LG_123_01_CLRNUMS
      SET SENET0_CREDIT = SENET0_CREDIT + @CEKAMNT,
   SENETCURR0_CREDIT = SENETCURR0_CREDIT + @CEKREP
      WHERE  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0))) AND LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF
 COMMIT TRANSACTION
    FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
    INTO @CEKREF, @AFFRISK
  END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE CURS CURSOR FOR
SELECT LOGICALREF
FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS WHERE CSREF IN (SELECT CSREF FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS
WHERE CARDMD=5 AND  CARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0))) AND AFFECTCOLLATRL=1 )
ORDER BY CSREF ,STATNO DESC
   OPEN CURS
   FETCH NEXT FROM CURS
   INTO @CEKREF
   WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
   BEGIN
     BEGIN TRANSACTION
 EXECUTE CLCSRISK_123_01 @CEKREF,@CLREF OUTPUT,@CLCIRO OUTPUT,@RISKCEK OUTPUT,@REPRISKCEK OUTPUT,@RISKCEKC OUTPUT,@REPRISKCEKC OUTPUT,
 @NUMSREF OUTPUT,@KC OUTPUT,@PS OUTPUT,@REPKC OUTPUT,@REPPS OUTPUT,@DOC OUTPUT,@RISKSTATUS OUTPUT,@PREVST OUTPUT,@DEVIR OUTPUT,@CEKAMNT OUTPUT,
 @CEKREP OUTPUT, @UPDAMNT OUTPUT, @RISKCOLLATRL OUTPUT, @REPRISKCOLLATRL OUTPUT, @COLLATRLREF OUTPUT,@NEWRISKCEK OUTPUT,@NEWREPRISKCEK OUTPUT,@NEWRISKCEKC OUTPUT,@NEWREPRISKCEKC OUTPUT,@CSCIRO OUTPUT
 IF @DOC IN (1,2) AND @RISKSTATUS <> 1
   BEGIN
               SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL    = @RISKCOLLATRL * -1
        SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = @REPRISKCOLLATRL * -1
          END
 IF @DOC IN (3,4)
          BEGIN
         SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = @RISKCOLLATRL
                SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = @REPRISKCOLLATRL
   END
 UPDATE LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
    SET RISKTOTAL = RISKTOTAL + @RISKCOLLATRL,
        REPRISKTOTAL = REPRISKTOTAL + @REPRISKCOLLATRL,
         CSRISKTOTAL = CSRISKTOTAL + (CASE WHEN (SELECT CURRSTAT FROM LG_123_01_CSCARD WHERE LOGICALREF = (SELECT CSREF FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS WHERE LOGICALREF = @CEKREF)) = 8 THEN 0 ELSE @RISKCOLLATRL END),
         REPCSRISKTOTAL = REPCSRISKTOTAL + @REPRISKCOLLATRL
    WHERE LOGICALREF = @COLLATRLREF AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 IF (@PREVST = 2) AND (@CLCIRO <> 0) AND (@CLCIRO <> @CLREF)
  BEGIN
     SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = @RISKCOLLATRL * -1
     SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = @REPRISKCOLLATRL * -1
     UPDATE LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
        SET RISKTOTAL = RISKTOTAL + @RISKCOLLATRL,
           REPRISKTOTAL = REPRISKTOTAL + @REPRISKCOLLATRL,
             CSRISKTOTAL = CSRISKTOTAL + @RISKCOLLATRL,
             REPCSRISKTOTAL = REPCSRISKTOTAL + @REPRISKCOLLATRL
        WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLCIRO AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
  END
 COMMIT TRANSACTION
    FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
    INTO @CEKREF
  END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE @CLNTREF INT
DECLARE @COLLTOTAL FLOAT
DECLARE @COLLLIMIT FLOAT
DECLARE @COLLREPTOTAL FLOAT
DECLARE @COLLREPLIMIT FLOAT
DECLARE CURS CURSOR FOR
SELECT  CLCARDREF, SUM(AMOUNT), SUM(AMOUNT*RISKFACTOR), SUM(CASE WHEN REPORTRATE <>0 THEN AMOUNT/REPORTRATE ELSE 0 END), SUM(CASE WHEN REPORTRATE <>0 THEN AMOUNT*RISKFACTOR/REPORTRATE ELSE 0 END)
FROM LG_123_01_COLLATRLCARD
WHERE (DOC=1) AND (CURRSTAT=1 ) AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
GROUP BY CLCARDREF
   OPEN CURS
   FETCH NEXT FROM CURS
   INTO @CLNTREF, @COLLTOTAL, @COLLLIMIT, @COLLREPTOTAL, @COLLREPLIMIT
   WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
   BEGIN
     BEGIN TRANSACTION
        UPDATE LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
    SET PCOLLATRLTOTAL = PCOLLATRLTOTAL + @COLLTOTAL,
               RISKLIMIT = RISKLIMIT + @COLLLIMIT,
               REPRISKLIMIT = REPRISKLIMIT + @COLLREPLIMIT,
        REPPCOLLATRLTOTAL = REPPCOLLATRLTOTAL + @COLLREPTOTAL
    WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLNTREF
        COMMIT TRANSACTION
    FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
    INTO @CLNTREF, @COLLTOTAL, @COLLLIMIT, @COLLREPTOTAL, @COLLREPLIMIT
  END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE CURS CURSOR FOR
SELECT  CLCARDREF, SUM(AMOUNT), SUM(AMOUNT*RISKFACTOR), SUM(CASE WHEN REPORTRATE <>0 THEN AMOUNT/REPORTRATE ELSE 0 END), SUM(CASE WHEN REPORTRATE <>0 THEN AMOUNT*RISKFACTOR/REPORTRATE ELSE 0 END)
FROM LG_123_01_COLLATRLCARD
WHERE (DOC=2) AND (CURRSTAT=2 ) AND  CLCARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_CLCARD_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE '120.RETECH - EUR' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
GROUP BY CLCARDREF
   OPEN CURS
   FETCH NEXT FROM CURS
   INTO @CLNTREF, @COLLTOTAL, @COLLLIMIT, @COLLREPTOTAL, @COLLREPLIMIT
   WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
   BEGIN
     BEGIN TRANSACTION
        UPDATE LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
    SET SCOLLATRLTOTAL = SCOLLATRLTOTAL + @COLLTOTAL,
               RISKLIMIT = RISKLIMIT - @COLLLIMIT,
               REPRISKLIMIT = REPRISKLIMIT - @COLLREPLIMIT,
        REPSCOLLATRLTOTAL = REPSCOLLATRLTOTAL + @COLLREPTOTAL
    WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLNTREF
        COMMIT TRANSACTION
    FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
    INTO @CLNTREF, @COLLTOTAL, @COLLLIMIT, @COLLREPTOTAL, @COLLREPLIMIT
  END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
